description: Rust MCP server for homelab logs, syslog, Docker logs, FTS search, and AI transcript correlation.
name: ai.dinglebear/cortex-rmcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional Cortex home directory containing configuration and local SQLite data.
environmentVariables.name: CORTEX_HOME

environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token for Cortex MCP HTTP mode; also used by some shared configs.
environmentVariables.name: CORTEX_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Bearer token for Cortex REST API routes when running daemon/API mode.
environmentVariables.name: CORTEX_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional GitHub release tag override for the downloaded Cortex binary.
environmentVariables.name: CORTEX_RMCP_VERSION

environmentVariables.description: Optional GitHub owner/repo override for release asset downloads.
environmentVariables.name: CORTEX_RMCP_REPO

environmentVariables.description: Optional release download base URL override.
environmentVariables.name: CORTEX_RMCP_RELEASE_BASE_URL

packageArguments.description: Run Cortex query-only stdio MCP mode.

title: Cortex RMCP
